description: Composition:Black round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with graphic chest printCare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking 5. Remove promptly 6. Line dry inside-out in shaded 7. Warm iron only 8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Slim FitA fan of the movie or a wild animal in human form, either way wear this black tee from guerrilla and let people  know that you are here to "Move it! Move it!". Team these with a pair of jeans or cargoes while hanging out with friends, going to the mall, the movies etc.Models' statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2.
